availability_rules: Slots are subject to prior bookings.
Advance booking is recommended for weekends.
Team practice and tournament bookings may block multiple slots.
Public holidays may have limited availability.
Live slot availability must be verified directly through booking support.

pricing.taxes_note: Please confirm with venue management during booking.

entry_rules.late_arrival_note: Late arrival may reduce playing time.

general: Entry only during booked slot timings.
venue_rules.spectators: Spectators must stay outside active playing area.
venue_rules.parking: Vehicles must be parked only in designated parking zones.

damage_dispute: Contact venue management. Investigation may be conducted. Final decision rests with management.

edge_cases.booking_confirmation_lost: Contact support with registered mobile number.
edge_cases.urgent_assistance: Contact venue support directly by phone or WhatsApp.

faqs.question: What are the operating hours of the ground?
faqs.answer: The ground is open daily from 7:00 AM to 5:00 PM.

faqs.question: What slot timings are available?
faqs.answer: Morning: 7:00 AM – 10:00 AM | Mid-Day: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM | Afternoon: 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM | Evening: 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM

faqs.question: How can I book a slot?
faqs.answer: Slots can be booked through direct contact with the venue. Availability is updated regularly based on existing bookings.

faqs.question: Are weekend slots available?
faqs.answer: Yes, but advance booking is highly recommended for weekends due to high demand.

faqs.question: Can tournament bookings block regular slots?
faqs.answer: Yes. Team practice sessions and tournament bookings may block multiple slots.

faqs.question: Are slots available on public holidays?
faqs.answer: Availability may be limited during public holidays.

faqs.question: What is the duration of one slot?
faqs.answer: Each slot duration is 2 hours.

faqs.question: What is the booking price?
faqs.answer: The booking price ranges between ₹1500 and ₹3000, depending on the slot and booking type.

faqs.question: Is full ground booking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, tournament or full-ground booking is available with custom pricing.

faqs.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: Accepted payment methods include UPI, Google Pay, PhonePe, Debit/Credit Cards, and Net Banking.

faqs.question: When will I receive payment confirmation?
faqs.answer: Payment confirmation is shared instantly after a successful transaction.

faqs.question: What details are included in the booking confirmation?
faqs.answer: Booking confirmation includes Booking ID, Date and slot timing, Payment status, and Venue details.

faqs.question: How will I receive booking confirmation?
faqs.answer: Confirmation is shared through SMS, WhatsApp, and Call confirmation.

faqs.question: How early should players arrive?
faqs.answer: Players should arrive 15–20 minutes before the booked slot time.

faqs.question: Is booking confirmation mandatory at entry?
faqs.answer: Yes. Booking confirmation must be shown at entry.

faqs.question: Are extra players allowed?
faqs.answer: No. Unauthorized extra players are not allowed.

faqs.question: What are the venue rules?
faqs.answer: Players must maintain discipline and sportsmanship, avoid abusive language or misconduct, follow staff/security instructions, and use proper cricket shoes and sportswear.

faqs.question: Can spectators enter the play area?
faqs.answer: No. Spectators should remain outside the active play area.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Parking is allowed only in designated areas.

faqs.question: What happens if venue property is damaged?
faqs.answer: Damage to the venue or property may incur penalties ranging from ₹300 to ₹1000+ depending on severity.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellation is allowed up to 6–12 hours before the slot time.

faqs.question: Are refunds available?
faqs.answer: Refund eligibility depends on cancellation timing.

faqs.question: When are refunds not applicable?
faqs.answer: No refund is provided for late cancellations, no-shows, or weather-safe playable conditions.

faqs.question: How long does refund processing take?
faqs.answer: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule my booking?
faqs.answer: Yes. Rescheduling is allowed once based on slot availability.

faqs.question: What is the price for a morning slot?
faqs.answer: Morning slot pricing starts from ₹1500.

faqs.question: What is the price for a mid-day slot?
faqs.answer: Mid-day slot pricing starts from ₹1900.

faqs.question: What is the price for an afternoon slot?
faqs.answer: Afternoon slot pricing starts from ₹2300.

faqs.question: What is the price for an evening slot?
faqs.answer: Evening slot pricing starts from ₹2800.

faqs.question: Why are evening slots more expensive?
faqs.answer: Evening slots are generally in higher demand and may include floodlight usage.

faqs.question: Is pricing the same every day?
faqs.answer: No. Pricing may vary based on weekends, holidays, tournaments, or special bookings.

faqs.question: Is there separate pricing for corporate events?
faqs.answer: Yes. Corporate bookings are available on custom pricing.

faqs.question: Is there separate pricing for tournaments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Tournament bookings are available on custom pricing.

faqs.question: Can I get a quote for a full-ground booking?
faqs.answer: Yes. Contact venue management for a custom quotation.

faqs.question: Are taxes included in the booking price?
faqs.answer: Please confirm with venue management during booking.

faqs.question: Can I organize a cricket tournament at BalleBaaz Arena?
faqs.answer: Yes. Tournament bookings are supported.

faqs.question: How do I book the entire ground for a tournament?
faqs.answer: Contact venue management directly for availability and pricing.

faqs.question: Can multiple matches be scheduled in a tournament?
faqs.answer: Yes, subject to slot availability.

faqs.question: Is scorer support available for tournaments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Scorers are available.

faqs.question: Are umpires available for tournaments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Umpires are available.

faqs.question: Can tournament organizers reserve multiple slots?
faqs.answer: Yes. Multiple slots may be reserved based on availability.

faqs.question: Is advance booking recommended for tournaments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Early booking is highly recommended.

faqs.question: Can companies organize corporate cricket matches?
faqs.answer: Yes. Corporate matches are supported.

faqs.question: Are corporate events available on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes, subject to slot availability.

faqs.question: Can a company reserve the entire venue?
faqs.answer: Yes. Full-ground bookings are available.

faqs.question: Is custom pricing available for corporate events?
faqs.answer: Yes. Corporate bookings are quoted separately.

faqs.question: Can recurring corporate matches be scheduled?
faqs.answer: Please contact venue management for recurring bookings.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my booking?
faqs.answer: Yes. Cancellation is allowed according to venue policy.

faqs.question: How long before the slot can I cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancellation is generally allowed 6–12 hours before the slot.

faqs.question: Will I receive a refund after cancellation?
faqs.answer: Refund eligibility depends on cancellation timing.

faqs.question: How long does refund processing take?
faqs.answer: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days.

faqs.question: Are refunds available for no-shows?
faqs.answer: No. No-shows are not eligible for refunds.

faqs.question: Are refunds available for late cancellations?
faqs.answer: No. Late cancellations may not qualify for refunds.

faqs.question: Will I receive a refund if weather conditions are playable?
faqs.answer: No. Refunds are not available when playing conditions are considered safe.

faqs.question: How will my refund be processed?
faqs.answer: Refunds are generally processed through the original payment method.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule my booking?
faqs.answer: Yes. One-time rescheduling is allowed.

faqs.question: Is rescheduling free?
faqs.answer: Please confirm with venue management.

faqs.question: How many times can I reschedule?
faqs.answer: Rescheduling is generally allowed once.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule to a weekend slot?
faqs.answer: Yes, subject to availability.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule after my slot time has passed?
faqs.answer: Please contact venue management for assistance.

faqs.question: Does the venue provide cricket balls?
faqs.answer: Yes. Cricket balls are available.

faqs.question: Does the venue provide cricket bats?
faqs.answer: No. Players should bring their own bats.

faqs.question: Are helmets provided?
faqs.answer: Players are advised to bring their own helmets.

faqs.question: Are pads provided?
faqs.answer: Players should bring their own pads.

faqs.question: Should I bring gloves?
faqs.answer: Yes. Personal cricket equipment is recommended.

faqs.question: Does the venue provide sportswear?
faqs.answer: No. Players should wear their own sportswear.

faqs.question: Is safety gear mandatory?
faqs.answer: Safety gear is strongly recommended.

faqs.question: Are washrooms available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Washroom facilities are available.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Parking is available.

faqs.question: How many vehicles can be parked?
faqs.answer: Approximately 25–30 cars can be accommodated.

faqs.question: Is drinking water available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Drinking water is available.

faqs.question: Are changing rooms available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Changing rooms are available.

faqs.question: Are lockers available?
faqs.answer: No. Locker facilities are not available.

faqs.question: Is a scoreboard available?
faqs.answer: Yes. A scoreboard is available.

faqs.question: Are floodlights available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Floodlights are available.

faqs.question: Is a pavilion available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pavilion and dugout facilities are available.

faqs.question: Is a sight screen available?
faqs.answer: Yes. A sight screen is available.

faqs.question: Is first aid available?
faqs.answer: Yes. First aid support is available.

faqs.question: Is smoking allowed inside the venue?
faqs.answer: No. Smoking is prohibited.

faqs.question: Is alcohol allowed inside the venue?
faqs.answer: No. Alcohol is strictly prohibited.

faqs.question: Can intoxicated individuals enter the venue?
faqs.answer: No. Entry may be denied.

faqs.question: Are spectators allowed on the field?
faqs.answer: No. Spectators must remain outside the active play area.

faqs.question: Are cricket shoes recommended?
faqs.answer: Yes. Proper cricket shoes are recommended.

faqs.question: Can abusive language lead to penalties?
faqs.answer: Yes. Misconduct is not tolerated.

faqs.question: Are players required to follow staff instructions?
faqs.answer: Yes. Staff and security instructions must be followed.

faqs.question: How can I contact BalleBaaz Arena?
faqs.answer: Call or WhatsApp +91 79974 74993.

faqs.question: What are the support hours?
faqs.answer: Support is available from 7:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

faqs.question: Can I contact support on WhatsApp?
faqs.answer: Yes. WhatsApp support is available.

faqs.question: Can I check slot availability over the phone?
faqs.answer: Yes. Contact venue management for availability.

faqs.question: Can I confirm my booking by phone?
faqs.answer: Yes. Booking assistance is available through support.

faqs.question: What happens if my payment fails?
faqs.answer: Retry the payment or contact support.

faqs.question: What happens if I accidentally book the wrong slot?
faqs.answer: Contact venue management immediately.

faqs.question: What if additional players arrive after booking?
faqs.answer: Please contact venue management for approval.

faqs.question: What happens if venue property is damaged?
faqs.answer: Applicable penalties may be charged.

faqs.question: Can I dispute a damage charge?
faqs.answer: Yes. Contact venue management for review.

faqs.question: What happens if a tournament is cancelled?
faqs.answer: Contact venue management for assistance.

faqs.question: What if I arrive late?
faqs.answer: Late arrival may reduce your available playing time.

faqs.question: What if my booking confirmation is lost?
faqs.answer: Contact support with your registered mobile number.

faqs.question: What if I forget to bring my cricket bat?
faqs.answer: Players are responsible for bringing their own bats.

faqs.question: What should I do if I need urgent booking assistance?
faqs.answer: Contact venue support directly by phone or WhatsApp.
